chunks.title: Prophetic Sign Act: Marriage and Mourning
chunks.reason: Divine command to Jeremiah regarding his personal life and mourning rituals as a sign of coming judgment.

chunks.title: Dialogue on the Cause of Judgment
chunks.reason: A question from the people regarding their sin and Jeremiah's response explaining the historical and current rebellion.

chunks.title: Oracle of Restoration and Pursuit
chunks.reason: A prophetic declaration contrasting the Exodus with a future return from exile, followed by imagery of divine pursuit and judgment.

chunks.title: Prayer and Final Declaration
chunks.reason: A brief prayer acknowledging God's power followed by a concluding oracle about the nations recognizing Yahweh.
